title: Reckonna — RED (command + query)
description: RED (Rate/Error/Duration) + ledger-domain signal for reckonna-command and reckonna-query. Datasource: self-hosted homelab Prometheus (kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus), NOT Grafana Cloud (plan 06 D-GRAFANA). Precondition baked into every reckonna_* query: service.name is an OTel RESOURCE attribute, not a metric label — it only lands on the synthetic `target_info` series unless the collector's `resource_to_telemetry_conversion` is enabled. These queries therefore join `* on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info` rather than assuming a bare `service_name` label exists on reckonna_* series (plan 06 D10 review_log). Latency uses avg (sum/count); percentile-quantile panels are unavailable — the live collector's filter/drop_high_cardinality strips the raw histogram buckets (D9).

panels.title: Request Rate
panels.description: sum(rate(reckonna_http_server_requests_total[5m])) joined to target_info for per-service_name breakdown (reckonna-command / reckonna-query).

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (rate(reckonna_http_server_requests_total[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info)

panels.title: Error Ratio (5xx)
panels.description: 5xx rate / total rate, joined to target_info for per-service_name breakdown.

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (rate(reckonna_http_server_requests_total{http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info) / sum by (service_name) (rate(reckonna_http_server_requests_total[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info)

panels.title: Avg Latency (ms)
panels.description: sum(rate(_sum))/sum(rate(_count)) — avg, NOT a percentile-quantile panel. The live collector's filter/drop_high_cardinality drops the raw histogram buckets, so p50/p95/p99 are unavailable (D9). Joined to target_info for per-service_name breakdown.

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_sum[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info) / sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info)

panels.title: Ledger Rejected (借方≠貸方)
panels.description: Domain invariant signal: unbalanced-ledger writes rejected (AT6). reckonna_ledger_rejected_total carries its own `reason` label (e.g. reason="unbalanced_entry"); service_name is resolved via the same target_info join.

targets.expr: sum by (service_name, reason) (rate(reckonna_ledger_rejected_total[5m]) * on (job, instance) group_left(service_name) target_info)
